notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.btn_push_noti: Enable push notifications on this device
notifications.blocked_desc: Notifications are blocked by your browser settings. Please enable them in your browser to receive updates.

footer.description: Give your objects a second life. A simple and eco-friendly way to trade and upcycle resources.

onboarding.finished_message: You have completed the onboarding tour. You are now ready to explore and use all the features of UpAgain!
onboarding.step_impact: Here is your impact overview. You can see how much CO2, water, and electricity you have saved!
onboarding.step_manage: Manage your listings and deposits easily from this section.
onboarding.step_quick_nav: Quickly navigate to events and the community here.
onboarding.step_market_list: In the marketplace, you can see objects listed by other users.
onboarding.step_market_list_pro: Welcome to the marketplace! Here, you can buy materials for your projects.
onboarding.step_market_post: Ready to contribute? Click here to post your first object!
onboarding.step_myitems: Track the status, reservations, and purchases of all your listings in one place.
onboarding.step_myitems_pro: Manage your reservations and purchases in one place under My Items.
onboarding.step_posts_list: Explore exciting articles and projects from professionals in our community.
onboarding.step_posts_list_pro: Explore the posts and tutorials, view your saved posts, and post your own projects here.
onboarding.step_posts_saved: See all your favorite saved posts here.
onboarding.step_events_list: Participate in our engaging events and workshops.
onboarding.step_events_list_pro: Explore and participate in events organized by our employees.
onboarding.step_events_planning: See all the events you are registered for in one place.
